case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS BAY AREA ADDICTION RESEARCH

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $256.28 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA ADDICTION RESEARCH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-25-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 03
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BAY AREA ADDICTION RESEARCH

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BAY AREA ADDICTION RESEARCH $256.28 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $256.28, PLFT'S NAME AMENDED TO BAY AREA ADDICTION RESEARCH SERVICE WAIVED BY DEFT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
